'Every day feels like a month': Iranians describe life under 'constant' US-Israeli strikesIranians are coping with daily strikes, internet blackouts, and security crackdowns - all while trying to stay in touch with loved ones. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cj4zze5lzjpo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cj4zze5lzjpo#1 Wed, 04 Mar 2026 19:31:24 GMT

Allergy training to become compulsory in schools in EnglandThe plans, due to come into force in September, follow support for Benedict's Law, a campaign to improve allergy safety in schools. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cp811lgp106o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cp811lgp106o#2 Thu, 05 Mar 2026 05:22:36 GMT
